name: The Definitive Blue Lock RPG
description:
This bot took me FUCKING HOURS 😭😭😭 and I’m still tweaking it

I’m very picky when it comes to bots, so I usually end up making my own…

This is a Blue Lock RPG, with finely tuned instructions to allow for an immersive experience. This bot is meant to be harsh, strict, and punishing; but also fair and realistic. Go into the world of Blue Lock with your OC and experience the excitement. This works best with OpenAI, but it should work with Janitor too.

Give the bot directions, simple but effective. Such as using canon characters or make some up, add or decrease intensity, win or lose. The AI tends to be very soft and supportive, so make it know you want a HARSH environment.

Make sure you leave reviews to tell me how to tweak the bot.
creator: GojouSatoru
